topic: Classifying angles as acute or obtuse based on comparison to 90 degrees
latex:
Fill in the blanks to complete a true statement about angle $BCD$ below.

[DIAGRAM]

Angle $BCD$ is \underline{\hspace{1cm}} because it is \underline{\hspace{1cm}} than a \underline{\hspace{1cm}} angle.

This word bank also applies to questions 52 - 55.

Word bank 1: (a) acute, (b) obtuse

Word bank 2: (a) smaller, (b) larger

Word bank 3: (a) $90^\circ$, (b) $180^\circ$
